executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Test Sprint 01 authentication and profile workflows only. App is CommUnity - Indonesian UI labels. Login uses username field (not email). Registration fields: full_name, username, email, password, password_confirmation. Protected routes: /dashboard, /profile. Auth pages: /login, /register, /forgot-password, /reset-password. Backend API at http://localhost:8000/api/v1. Test credentials: username=testuser password=password if needed - register new users if login fails.
